annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under KRS 360.040 — 6% per year, fixed by statute, compounded annually. Default (tort/general/unpaid money judgments, and prejudgment interest once reduced to judgment): 6% compounded annually [KRS 360.040(1)]. CHILD… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
